mapper.select: SELECT b.user_id,b.user_name FROM ct_shop_merchant_relation a JOIN ct_merchant b on a.merchant_id = b.user_id WHERE b.merchant_level = 1 and b.del_flag = 0 and a.shop_id = #{shopId}

SELECT a.id,a.shop_id,a.`status`,b.user_id as merchantId,b.user_name as merchantName,b.merchant_level FROM ct_shop_merchant_relation a JOIN ct_merchant b on a.merchant_id = b.user_id WHERE b.del_flag = 0 and a.shop_id = #{dto.shopId}
and b.user_name like concat('%',#{dto.merchantName},'%')
